title: Pan-Seared Slovakian Chicken with Citrus Crust
description: A crispy and flavorful Slovakian dish with a bright citrus twist.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine buttermilk and citrus zest. Add chicken and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
2. Preheat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together flour, crispy breadcrumbs, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
4. Remove chicken from buttermilk mixture, letting any excess liquid drip off.
5. Dredge chicken in flour mixture, shaking off excess.
6. Dip floured chicken in beaten eggs, making sure to coat completely.
7. Roll egg-coated chicken in flour mixture again, pressing gently to adhere.
8. Fry chicken in hot oil until golden brown and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes per side.
9. Transfer fried chicken to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
